intro:

sections.title: Embir in the USA — the better alternative
sections.content: Hinge has name recognition in the USA, but Embir offers something fundamentally better: strict bidirectional orientation filtering, verified profiles, reporting and blocking, and complete free access to core connection features.
highlights: the USA is a primary launch market for Embir
free for core connections — no subscription required

verdict: In the USA, Embir is the best alternative to Hinge in 2026: verified profiles, bidirectional filtering, universal LGBTQ+ inclusivity, and core connection features are free.

faq.q: Is Embir available in the USA?
faq.a: Yes. the USA is one of Embir's primary launch markets. The founding community is active and growing.

faq.q: How does Embir compare to Hinge in the USA?
faq.a: Embir offers verified profiles, bidirectional filtering, LGBTQ+ inclusivity, and free access that Hinge doesn't match.
